title: Tick 1: apply branch protection on outcomes-mcp main (queue item A1)
question: Does the outcomes-mcp main branch now require the outcome-gate and typecheck status checks before merge, with enforce_admins and linear history enforced even against the operator?

enforce_admins is enabled so the gate cannot be bypassed by repo admins including alex-jadecli
required_linear_history is enabled so the merge log stays bisectable

capabilities: required status checks outcome-gate and typecheck enforced on outcomes-mcp main
